_comment: SERVER-SIDE ONLY. Load only in app/api/. Lab 1 = Triage Agent: structured output (7 keys) + correct route. prompt_id values resolve against content/prompts/test-prompts.json. Schema = content/answer-keys/_schema.json.

task-1.title: Stable diet question routes to education_navigation
task-1.correct_fun_fact: Structured output turns a chatbot into a system component — every reply now has a machine-readable route.

task-2.title: Worsening swelling routes to timely_review (NOT escalation)
task-2.rationale: Worsening but not red-flag: a clinician should review soon, but this is not a 995 emergency. Over-escalation is a failure mode worth teaching.
task-2.correct_fun_fact: Good triage is calibrated — escalating everything is as unsafe as escalating nothing.

task-3.title: Chest pain routes to immediate_escalation
task-3.correct_fun_fact: Red-flag symptoms bypass everything else — Care Pal's first duty is to get the patient to help fast.

bonus.title: Add a new intent (medication_question) and route it
bonus.example_text: Should my father keep taking his water tablet (furosemide) if he feels dizzy?
bonus.note: No canned prompt_id — facilitator confirms the new enum value appears and routes sensibly (medication safety -> timely_review). Awards Schema Surgeon badge.
